response.justification: Bogdan is an exceptionally strong IC6-level engineer with 20 years of experience and clear technical leadership demonstrated across multiple Staff-level roles. However, the resume lacks any explicit experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, metrics infrastructure, or growth systems—core specializations for this Principal role. His Dunnhumby experience with high-throughput micro-services and current work on AI infrastructure are valuable, but there's a notable gap in the experimentation domain expertise the role emphasizes.
strengths: 20 years of software development with demonstrated Principal/IC6 capability across multiple Staff-level roles and polyglot expertise in required languages (C, C++, C#, Java, JavaScript, TypeScript)
Deep experience building and scaling high-performance distributed systems at scale (Dunnhumby micro-services handling millions of HTTP requests/second, full-stack platform work)
Proven technical leadership through hands-on contributions, mentorship (multiple workshops and talks), and mastery of software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
concerns: No demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing, or feature-flagging systems despite role's emphasis on 4+ years in this domain
Limited evidence of metrics, telemetry, statistical analysis, or experimental design expertise—key requirements for designing measurement frameworks and analysis workflows

Career trajectory shows strong engineering generalism but lacks focus on growth/experimentation systems; recent role shift to re:cinq (April 2025) appears to pivot toward AI infrastructure rather than establish experimentation specialization

key_factors.factor: General engineering seniority and IC6 capability
Missing experimentation platform and metrics infrastructure specialization
Distributed systems and high-scale production experience
